message:
test(core): Add unit tests for FieldInfo precision/scale and effective_sql_type

Add comprehensive test coverage for DECIMAL/NUMERIC field metadata:

- test_field_info_new: Verify default state without precision/scale
- test_field_info_precision_scale: Test builder methods
- test_field_info_decimal_precision: Test decimal_precision() helper
- test_effective_sql_type_override_takes_precedence: Override wins over computed
- test_effective_sql_type_uses_precision_scale: Verify DECIMAL(p,s) formatting
- test_effective_sql_type_numeric_uses_precision_scale: NUMERIC variant

These tests ensure DDL generation produces correct type declarations
for fixed-point decimal columns across different configurations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
